title: SoFi Stock Analyst Upgrade Momentum
text: SoFi Technologies is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 26.9% and 15.9% per annum respectively. SoFi reported record Q1 2026 net revenue of about $1.1 billion, a 41-43% year-over-year increase, and net income of $166.7 million, with ten consecutive profitable quarters and its 18th straight quarter above the Rule of 40. The last upgrade for SoFi Technologies Inc happened on February 9, 2026 when Citizens raised their price target to $30. JPMorgan analyst Reginal Smith raised the rating on SoFi to Overweight from Neutral and reiterated a $31 price target on Tuesday, suggesting roughly 40% upside from current levels. Smith noted that Momentum in the business is undeniable, as SoFi continues to add new members and deposits at a record pace, while other fintechs report deposit outflows or stagnant member growth. According to 17 analysts, the average rating for SOFI stock is Buy. The 12-month stock price target is $22.75, which is an increase of 48.60% from the latest price.
